stem: A ecology study surveys 20 sampled plots and observes 9 positive outcomes out of 20 (45.0%). Estimate the true species occurrence rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.45. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2582, 0.6579]. Point estimate: 0.4581.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
Not recognizing that with n=20, the normal approximation may be poor
